##RRUFFID=R120114
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Ni(UO_2_)_2_(AsO_4_)_2_·8H_2_O
##LOCALITY=Schweizer vein, 90 level, Eduard mine, Jachymov, Krusne Hory Mts., Czech Republic
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Dr Peter Kolesar
##DESCRIPTION=Aggregates of yellow play crystals, associated with green platy metazeunerite

##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
